[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00100101 3
1 00100110 3
2 01000110 3
3 01100101 4
4 00100000 1
5 11100111 6
6 00010011 3
7 01101100 4
